seo_description: Current time in Lima, Peru — live Peru Time (PET, UTC-5) clock, no DST, and time differences with Bogotá, New York, London, and world cities.

faq.question: What time is it in Lima right now?
faq.answer: Lima, Peru uses Peru Time (PET, UTC-5) year-round. Peru does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Lima is on the same UTC offset as US Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) in winter, which means Lima aligns with New York from November to March. The IANA timezone identifier is America/Lima.

faq.question: What time zone is Lima in?
faq.answer: Lima is in the Peru Time zone (PET, UTC-5). Peru uses UTC-5 year-round with no DST. Lima shares this offset with Bogotá (Colombia), Guayaquil (Ecuador), and New York during US winter. The IANA identifier is America/Lima.

faq.question: Does Lima observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Peru does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Lima remains on PET (UTC-5) year-round. During US Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4), New York is 1 hour ahead of Lima. Peru's choice not to observe DST simplifies scheduling for this major South American business hub.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Lima and New York?
faq.answer: Lima (PET, UTC-5) and New York are on the same time from November to March (both UTC-5). During US Daylight Saving Time (EDT, UTC-4, March–November), New York is 1 hour ahead of Lima. The gap oscillates between 0 and 1 hour depending on the US DST period.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Lima and London?
faq.answer: Lima (PET, UTC-5) is 5 hours behind London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During UK summer (BST, UTC+1), London is 6 hours ahead of Lima. Since Peru has no DST, the gap changes only when London transitions its clocks.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Lima and Santiago?
faq.answer: Lima (PET, UTC-5) and Santiago (CLT, UTC-3 in winter; CLST, UTC-3 in summer — Chile recently eliminated DST) differ by 2–3 hours. Chile is ahead of Lima. The exact gap depends on Chile's current clock schedule.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Lima?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Lima are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM PET, Monday through Friday. Lima is Peru's capital and the 5th largest city in South America, home to the Lima Stock Exchange (BVL) which operates 9:00 AM–4:00 PM PET. Major industries include mining, finance, textiles, and fishing. Peru is a leading exporter of copper, gold, and silver.
